title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Judge, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a duel!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Germa kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that the duel is between the commander and this 'sanji' guy we've been hearing about!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just what kind of guy is he?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, it's not too hard to imagine...

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: GERMA KINGDOM: YONJI FORTRESS

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just heard that Sanji was still going on about declining the marriage... so I told him off in place of our father!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't expect things would be much different from back then... but this was the result!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That bastard... I'll make him pay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Yonji, I don't think a hammer is going to do the job.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to use the press machine, so hold still.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Say what?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: as good as new.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Curses...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...How could a good-for- nothing like him possibly get the better of me...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So that's Master Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 7 Looks strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's not even wearing a raid suit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bounty of his seriously wasn't just for show!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you dare to kick your own father?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You started this fight, so I'm gonna finish hit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore, don't you dare call yourself my parent anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've returned home, Sanji!! This means that you are indeed my son!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard for me to feel the sentiment in that when you're waving around a big ass spear trying to impale me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have every intention of leaving this place and returning to my crew as soon as this "Tea Party" bullshit is over! The marriage is a total farce!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get some!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Still harping on about that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you truly think that big mom will sit idly by in the face of such betrayal?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could care less about what happens to you all after the fact!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only came here to protect my crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you saying... that you'd sacrifice your own family?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times do I have to say it... you're definitely no family of mine!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You good-for- nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This piece of shit was caught in the middle of making food for a bunch of filthy rats again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Royals aren't meant to dirty their hands cooking, moron!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
